title: Smoky Grilled Runner Beans with Silky Sauce
description: A savory and slightly sweet side dish made with smoky grilled runner beans and a silky sauce. Perfect for a summer evening.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Trim the ends of the runner beans and slice them into 1-inch pieces.
Brush the grill with grill oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the runner beans for 2-3 minutes per side, or until tender and slightly charred.
In a small bowl, whisk together the silky sauce, soy sauce, brown sugar, and garlic powder.
Once the runner beans are cooked, brush them with the sauce and serve hot.
